Decentralized Logistics Marketplace

Agentic Delivery Console

Seller agent / pooled couriers / buyer mailbox / escrow vault

Network

Disconnected

01 Request Open + code hashes
02 Bids Pool capacity checked
03 Agent Accept r/(t*p) policy
04 Vault Funded Buyer escrow
05 Pickup Bound code proof
06 Mailbox Dropoff confirm
07 Finalize Payout/refund/slash

Log


          

        

      


      

        

          Agent boundary
          Session key, price ceiling, deadline buffer, co-sign threshold
        

        

          Code binding
          keccak256(code || deliveryId || nonce)
        

        

          Pool invariant
          activeValue <= totalStake, member reservation cap
        

        

          Mailbox boundary
          Separate mailbox key, dispute window before payout
